meaning: n.计程车司机,出租马车的车夫
examples: The host grabbed the bills and initiated a verbal assault upon the cabby, calling him a worthless parasite and a disgrace to their country for trying to overcharge visitors.
The last words were spoken to Polly and the Cabby who had now arrived.
Two minutes later the cabby kicked me out of his cab because I stunk. FML
Still, drivers try to beat the averages, including Mr. Schwartz himself, a former cabby who said he is among the city's aggressive drivers.
